channel.title: Replicated, Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Replicated, Inc. (replicated).

item.title: CVE-2021-42718 · 4.9 MEDIUM — Sensitive data unnecessarily returned from authenticated API
item.description: Information Disclosure in API in Replicated Replicated Classic versions prior to 2.53.1 on all platforms allows authenticated users with Admin Console access to retrieve sensitive data, including application secrets, via accessing container definitio…

item.title: CVE-2021-43058
item.description: An open redirect vulnerability exists in Replicated Classic versions prior to 2.53.1 that could lead to spoofing. To exploit this vulnerability, an attacker could send a link that has a specially crafted URL and convince the user to click the link, r…
